chapter_title.en: Chapter 123 – The Tawaaf and touching the corners

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/22)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/22)
text: كَانَ عَلِيُّ بْنُ الْحُسَيْنِ ( عليه السلام ) إِذَا بَلَغَ الْحَجَرَ قَبْلَ أَنْ يَبْلُغَ الْمِيزَابَ يَرْفَعُ رَأْسَهُ ثُمَّ يَقُولُ اللَّهُمَّ أَدْخِلْنِي الْجَنَّةَ بِرَحْمَتِكَ وَ هُوَ يَنْظُرُ إِلَى الْمِيزَابِ وَ أَجِرْنِي بِرَحْمَتِكَ مِنَ النَّارِ وَ عَافِنِي مِنَ السُّقْمِ وَ أَوْسِعْ عَلَيَّ مِنَ الرِّزْقِ الْحَلَالِ وَ ادْرَأْ عَنِّي شَرَّ فَسَقَةِ الْجِنِّ وَ الْإِنْسِ وَ شَرَّ فَسَقَةِ الْعَرَبِ وَ الْعَجَمِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Umar Bin Aasim,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘It was so that whenever Ali<sup>asws</sup> Bin Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup> reached the (Black) Stone before reaching the water spout, raised his<sup>asws</sup> head, then he<sup>asws</sup> was saying: ‘Enter me<sup>asws</sup> into the Paradise by Your<sup>azwj</sup> Mercy’, and he<sup>asws</sup> was looking at the water spout: ‘And Save me<sup>asws</sup>, by Your<sup>azwj</sup> Mercy, from the Fire, and Make me well from the illness, and Expand upon me<sup>asws</sup> from the Permissible sustenance, and Turn away from me<sup>asws</sup> the evil of the wicked Jinns and the humans, and evil of the wicked Arabs and non-Arabs’.
en.sarwar: 5. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from ‘Umar ibn ‘Asem who has said the following: “Abu `Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that when Ali ibn al-Husayn, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, would go near the Black Stone, before reaching al-Mizab, raise his head and say, £ 0 Allah, admit me in paradise through Your mercy and kindness/ and look at al-Mizab. Then he would say, ‘O Allah, grant me protection through Your mercy against hellfire, grant me good health against illnesses, increase my sustenance from Your lawful provisions, and keep away from me the wickedness of sinful Satan in the form of Jinn, man, Arab and non- Arab people/”
